name: claude.ai Atlassian
description: Atlassian MCP server — provides access to Jira issues, Confluence pages, and development panel data.
setup_instructions:
1. Go to Claude settings > MCP Servers
2. Click 'Add MCP Server'
3. Name: claude.ai Atlassian
4. Type: HTTP
5. URL: https://mcp.atlassian.com/v1/mcp
6. Authenticate with your Atlassian account when prompted
